race.comment: CONCERNED (2) finished a close fourth over 1050m at this track last time following a minor placing on debut the run before. Should settle just off the speed despite the nasty draw. Major player based on that debut run. Follow up. DREAMS DON'T DIE (8) is a nicely bred two-year-old filly making her first appearance at the races. By I Am Immortal from Fighting Flyer who has produced her share of winners. Has only trialled once and was successful at Sunshine Coast Inner Track. Ready to run well despite a tricky draw. GUNNA WANNABE (4) is appearing for the first time. By Shalaa and is out of the Alyssa & Troy Sweeney stable. Placed at his most recent trial. Can make a bright start.
